creator: barak@cwnt.com
text:
Hi,
 
I'm using FreeBSD 4.2 release on a dual CPU DL360 machine.
I have used the patch in pr19338 to fix the MP problem.
 
However, when booting up the MP kernel, the CDROM is no longer detected, while it is detected under the GENERIC kernel.
 
The relevant dmesg lines:
...
ata1-master: ata_command: timeout waiting for intr
ata1-master: identify failed
...
 
In the GENERIC boot the regular acd0 detection appear, instead.
 
Thanks,
Barak
barak@cwnt.com

Fix: 

none
How-To-Repeat: boot a recent MP kernel on a DL360. look at the dmesg, or try to operate the cdrom.
